description: Create a folder named 'Chicago Distribution Network' in My Places containing three styled paths: (1) 'Primary Route - Hub to Regional DC' from O'Hare (41.9742°N, 87.9073°W) to Joliet Intermodal (41.4545°N, 88.0817°W), red, 3px; (2) 'Primary Route - Regional DC to South Hub' from Joliet to University Park (41.4428°N, 87.7214°W), red, 3px; (3) 'Secondary Route - East Connection' from University Park to Gary, IN (41.5934°N, 87.3464°W), blue, 2px. Export the folder as KML to /home/ga/Documents/chicago_distribution_network.kml.
